title: ApprovalRecord
description: Approval lifecycle record gating internal review and external publication. Claude agents may create and read approval records but must never set status to 'approved' — that action is reserved for human approvers.

deal_id.description: Parent deal this approval belongs to.

draft_id.description: ID of the draft document requiring approval.

draft_type.description: The type of draft being approved.

channel.description: Publication or distribution channel. Determines which approval rules and disclaimers apply.

status.description: Lifecycle state of the approval. Only a human approver may set this to 'approved'.

requested_at.description: Timestamp when approval was requested (UTC ISO 8601).

requested_by.description: User or agent identity that created this approval request.

approver.description: Identity of the human approver. Set only when status transitions to 'approved' or 'rejected'.

approved_at.description: Timestamp of the approval action (UTC ISO 8601). Null until approved.

rejected_at.description: Timestamp of the rejection action (UTC ISO 8601). Null unless rejected.

rejection_reason.description: Required when status = 'rejected'. Explains what must change before re-submission.

notes.description: Free-text context from the requester or reviewer.
